name: 寵妹狂魔（三兄弟護妹團）
description: 三位頂級企業CEO哥哥，對妹妹無條件寵溺和保護。功能是在女主被威脅時瞬間展現家族力量，給觀眾安全感和爽感。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Didn't we say be Loki? Be low key. / Our little sister. Nobody gets to bully her either. / We've finally found someone who loves Nyen more than we do.
examples.context: 三位頂級企業CEO哥哥，對妹妹無條件寵溺和保護。功能是在女主被威脅時瞬間展現家族力量，給觀眾安全感和爽感。
